notes: The Shuriken is a consumable ranged weapon . It can hit up to 4 targets. Shurikens can be found in Pots and Chests around the world, and can be purchased from the Merchant for 15 CC each.
The Sickle is purchased from the Merchant for 60 SC .
The balloons are purely visual, with no functional effect, and can be produced infinitely at no cost. The Silly Balloon Machine is purchased from the Party Girl for 5 GC .

conditions: Silver Ore is a pre-Hardmode ore . It spawns in the Underground and Cavern layers , and occasionally on Floating Islands . Silver Ore also has a small chance to appear as a bonus drop from slimes .

The Skull is a rare vanity item that has a 1/500 (0.2%) chance of being dropped by Skeletons and Spore Skeletons (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) , which are found in the Cavern layer , or a 1/2500 (0.04%) chance by those spawned from a Skeleton Statue or a Bone Skeleton Statue (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) .

The Sky Blue Flower is a type of plant . It grows on Jungle grass in any layer except the Underworld , or on regular Sand Blocks submerged in at least 2 tiles of any liquid above surface . [ 1 ] Unlike many plants, instead of broken by any attack, it has to be harvested with a pickaxe . Its sole purpose is to make Sky Blue Dye .

notes: The Sky Mill has a 1/3 (33.33%) chance of being obtained from Skyware Chests on Floating Islands . It can also be purchased from the Steampunker for 10 GC if she is spoken to in Space (above 65% altitude of the surface).

The Slap Hand is a Hardmode broadsword that can be purchased from the Skeleton Merchant for 25 GC during a Blood Moon . It is notable for having extremely high base knockback – a rating of 20, one of the highest values among all player-caused sources of knockback. The Slap Hand also has a 19% base critical strike chance , as opposed to the usual 4%.

conditions: Unlike equipment buff items , the Slice of Cake must be placed in order to activate the buff. It can be mined with a pickaxe or drill and picked up again, even while the buff is active, which will not cancel the buff. Placement is only dependent on an adequate space of 2×2 tiles being available.

The Slimy Saddle is a pre-Hardmode mount-summoning item that summons a friendly Slime Mount . The Slime offers increased jump height (21 tiles) and movement speed ( 20 mph ), decreases fall damage by half, and enables floating on water surfaces and continuous auto-jump by holding the ↷ Jump key. On the Desktop version , Console version , and Mobile version , landing on an enemy while riding this mount will deal 40 summon damage (excluding defense ) and cause the player to bounce off them. The Slime Mount is considered a minion while calculating the damage of the bounce and benefits from effects that boost the damage of summons . The Slimy Saddle has a 1/4 (25%) chance of being dropped by King Slime and a 1/2 (50%) chance of being found in King Slime's Treasure Bag (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) in Expert Mode (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) .

notes: Smoke Blocks are animated background furniture blocks that can be purchased from the Party Girl for 1 SC in Hardmode . When placed together, they will connect in a way that each block on the outer left and right sides visually take up half of a block. For example, if a player were to make a 3×3 arrangement of Smoke Blocks, the entire left and right columns of smoke will appear to be halved, resulting in a slimmer appearance.

The Smoke Bomb is a throwable, consumable novelty item that, when thrown, emits thick gray smoke for one minute. Upon throwing a Smoke Bomb, it will bounce or roll until it comes to a complete stop and continues to release smoke. Each can only be used once and cannot be picked up again once thrown. Smoke Bombs can be purchased from the Party Girl for 20 CC each.

conditions: The Snail is a rather rare critter that spawns in the Underground and Cavern layers, but not in Ice , Crimson , Corruption , or Hallow biomes. It can also spawn in front of unsafe Living Wood Walls below the surface at a much higher rate. The Snail has only 5 health and no defense , and can be damaged by other enemies and players.

quantityText: Snowball Cannon (If Remix seed is active)
Snowball Cannon (If Remix seed is not active)

conditions: The Snowball Cannon is a pre-Hardmode ranged weapon which uses Snowballs as ammunition . The Snowball Cannon has a 15.52% chance of being found inside Frozen Chests in the Ice biome , as well as a 1/6 (16.67%) chance of being obtained from Frozen and Boreal Crates .

Snow Blocks are blocks found naturally-placed in the Snow Biome . Snow Blocks placed in the Surface layer, either naturally or by a player, will cause a snowfall effect. This is purely visual, and has no functional effects. Snow Blocks cannot be infected by the Hallow or evil biomes . Snow in any form cannot be melted into water , nor produced from water or Ice Blocks .
In Drunk worlds, Snow Clouds are generated naturally as part of snow-themed Floating Islands .

The Snow Wall is a type of background wall which can be found naturally generated in the Snow biome , considered unsafe . It does not drop as an item when destroyed, and can only be obtained on Desktop , Console , and Mobile , via crafting. It is considered a safe wall when placed by the player.

Solar Tablets have a 1/5 (20%) chance to be found in Lihzahrd Chests in the Jungle Temple . Additionally, Lihzahrds and Flying Snakes have a 1/7 (14.29%) chance of dropping 1–2 Solar Tablet Fragments , which can be used to craft a Solar Tablet.
The Spear is a pre-Hardmode spear that has a 1/10 (10%) chance of being found in Wooden Chests that are located on the surface as well as in the underground layer .

The Spear Trap is a trap found naturally in the Jungle Temple and, rarely, outside the Temple's door. When activated, it launches a spear in a straight line that can pierce an infinite number of targets and retracts upon hitting a solid block or reaching its maximum range of 19.5 tiles. It has a cooldown of (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) 1.5 seconds / (Old-gen console and 3DS versions) 2 seconds between firings. The spear deals 120 / 240 / 360 damage to players (60 damage to NPCs , enemies , and critters ). [ 1 ]

chanceText: 5% (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) 2.5% (Old-gen console and 3DS versions) 9.75%

conditions: Specular Fish are a type of fish that are commonly found by fishing in a Forest , Jungle or Snow biome in the Underground , Cavern , and Underworld layers. They are used to craft Seafood Dinners , Recall Potions , and Wormhole Potions .

notes: The Spell Tome is a Hardmode crafting material that is purchased from the Wizard for 5 GC .

The Spelunker Glowstick is a consumable light source that can be held or tossed a fair distance, similar to the regular Glowstick . In addition, it highlights the location of nearby treasures in a 30-tile radius around the glowstick with a slight yellowish glimmer. Spelunker Glowsticks can be purchased from the Skeleton Merchant for 1 SC 50 CC each at nighttime . During a full moon , they can also be purchased at daytime.
